response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform expertise; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal evidence of cloud compute leadership or distributed systems at scale, and no clear track record in technical leadership mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers as required.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Proven open-source contributions and technical mentoring via workshops
Experience with distributed systems and Kubernetes deployment
concerns: Only minimal C++ exposure (LabWindows/CVI role), far below 8-year requirement
No demonstrable experience with cloud compute platforms or infrastructure design
Lacks documented technical leadership in cloud/DevOps team mentoring
